original_image_tags: A small, blue, circular stamp is visible to the left of the "SUBJECT" line. The text within the stamp is not legible.

elements.description: Typed United States Government Memorandum dated 10/2/62 regarding 'UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS (FLYING SAUCERS)', with a distribution list on the right and multiple handwritten signatures, stamps, and file numbers.

judge.reason: Description A claims a specific blue circular stamp is visible, while Description B claims there is only typed text and no visual content like stamps or images, directly contradicting on the presence of visual elements.
